allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Pending decisions: {len\(d.get\(\\"pending\\", []\)\)}'\); [print\(f'  {x[\\"id\\"]} {x[\\"symbol\\"]} {x[\\"action\\"]} {x[\\"agent\\"]}'\) for x in d.get\('pending', []\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) pv = d.get\('portfolio_value', 0\) cash = d.get\('cash', 0\) pnl = d.get\('pnl', 0\) pos = len\(d.get\('positions', []\)\) trades = len\(d.get\('trades', []\)\) dd = d.get\('drawdown', 0\) print\(f'Portfolio: \\${pv:,.0f}'\) print\(f'Cash: \\${cash:,.0f}'\) print\(f'P&L: \\${pnl:,.0f}'\) print\(f'Drawdown: {dd:.2f}%'\) print\(f'Positions: {pos}'\) print\(f'Trades: {trades}'\) print\(f'Stack: {d.get\(\\"stack_status\\", \\"?\\"\)}'\) print\(f'Doctrine: {d.get\(\\"doctrine_version\\", \\"?\\"\)}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('aureon_state_persist.json'\)\); print\('top-level keys:', sorted\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('positions:', len\(d.get\('positions',[]\)\)\); print\('trades:', len\(d.get\('trades',[]\)\)\); print\('authority_log:', len\(d.get\('authority_log',[]\)\)\); print\('saved_at:', d.get\('saved_at'\)\)")
